description:
Calculate odds and probabilities for the Bulgarian card game Svarka
Svarka Odds Calculator

Calculate odds and probabilities for the popular Bulgarian card game Svarka. This app helps players make informed decisions by providing accurate mathematical calculations for different game scenarios.

Features:
- Calculate winning odds for different hand combinations
- Support for various game rules and scenarios
- Easy-to-use interface designed for Svarka players
- Fast and accurate calculations

Perfect for both beginners and experienced Svarka players who want to improve their game strategy and understanding of probabilities.
